user.title: Add First Encoder (Source)
user.description: Enter the name and channel number of your first Just Add Power encoder. The channel number is the Input # assigned by AMP (e.g., 1 for Input 1).

encoder_menu.title: Encoders Added: {count}
encoder_menu.description: Would you like to add another encoder or proceed to adding decoders?

add_decoder.title: Add Decoder (Display)
add_decoder.description: Enter the name and IP address of the decoder on the JAP VLAN.

decoder_menu.title: Decoders Added: {count}
decoder_menu.description: Would you like to add another decoder or finish setup?

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to decoder. Verify IP address and that the device is on the network.

abort.already_configured: Just Add Power is already configured.
